name: Altar
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $5.

name: Armory
instructions: Gain a card onto your deck costing up to $4.

name: Band of Misfits
instructions: Play a non-Command non-Duration Action card from the Supply that costs less than this, leaving it there.

name: Bandit Camp
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
Gain a Spoils.

name: Beggar
instructions:
Gain 3 Coppers to your hand.
-----
When another player plays an Attack card, you may first discard this to gain 2 Silvers, putting one onto your deck.

name: Catacombs
instructions:
Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Choose one: Put them into your hand; or discard them and +3 Cards.
-----
When you trash this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Count
instructions:
Choose one: Discard 2 cards; or put a card from your hand onto your deck; or gain a Copper.
Choose one: +$3; or trash your hand; or gain a Duchy.

name: Counterfeit
instructions:
$1
+1 Buy
You may play a non-Duration Treasure from your hand twice. Trash it.

name: Cultist
instructions:
+2 Cards
Each other player gains a Ruins. You may play a Cultist from your hand.
-----
When you trash this, +3 Cards.

name: Dame Anna
instructions: You may trash up to 2 cards from your hand. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Dame Josephine
instructions:
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.
-----
2 VP

name: Dame Molly
instructions:
+2 Actions
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Dame Natalie
instructions: You may gain a card costing up to $3. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Dame Sylvia
instructions:
+$2
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Death Cart
instructions:
You may trash this or an Action card from your hand, for +$5.
-----
When you gain this, gain 2 Ruins.

name: Feodum
instructions:
Worth 1 VP per 3 Silvers you have (round down).
-----
When you trash this, gain 3 Silvers.

name: Forager
instructions:
+1 Action
+1 Buy
Trash a card from your hand, then +$1 per differently named Treasure in the trash.

name: Fortress
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
-----
When you trash this, put it into your hand.

name: Graverobber
instructions: Choose one: Gain a card from the trash costing from $3 to $6, onto your deck; or trash an Action card from your hand and gain a card costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Hermit
instructions: Look through your discard pile. You may trash a non-Treasure from it or from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $3. At the end of your Buy phase this turn, if you didn't gain any cards in it, exchange this for a Madman.

name: Hovel
instructions: When you gain a Victory card, you may trash this from your hand.

name: Hunting Grounds
instructions:
+4 Cards
-----
When you trash this, gain a Duchy or 3 Estates.

name: Ironmonger
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top card of your deck; you may discard it. Either way, if it is an...
Action card, +1 Action
Treasure card, +$1
Victory card, +1 Card

name: Junk Dealer
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+$1
Trash a card from your hand.

name: Knights
instructions: Setup: Shuffle the Knights pile before each game with the Knights. Keep it face down except for the top card, which is the only one that can be bought or gained.

name: Madman
instructions:
+2 Actions
Return this to the Madman pile. If you do, +1 Card per card in your hand.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Marauder
instructions: Gain a Spoils. Each other player gains a Ruins.

name: Market Square
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+1 Buy
-----
When one of your cards is trashed, you may discard this from your hand to gain a Gold.

name: Mercenary
instructions:
You may trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, +2 Cards, +$2, and each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Mystic
instructions:
+1 Action
+$2
Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If you named it, put it into your hand.

name: Necropolis
instructions: +2 Actions

name: Overgrown Estate
instructions:
0 VP
-----
When you trash this, +1 Card.

name: Pillage
instructions: Trash this. If you did, gain 2 Spoils, and each other player with 5 or more cards in hand reveals their hand and discards a card that you choose.

name: Poor House
instructions:
+$4
Reveal your hand. -$1 per Treasure card in your hand. (You can't go below $0.)

name: Procession
instructions: You may play a non-Duration Action card from your hand twice. Trash it. Gain an Action card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Rats
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Gain a Rats. Trash a card from your hand other than a Rats (or reveal a hand of all Rats).
-----
When you trash this, +1 Card.

name: Rebuild
instructions:
+1 Action
Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Victory card you did not name. Discard the rest, trash the Victory card, and gain a Victory card costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Rogue
instructions:
+$2
If there are any cards in the trash costing from $3 to $6, gain one of them. Otherwise, each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest.

name: Ruined Library
instructions: +1 Card

name: Ruined Market
instructions: +1 Buy

name: Ruined Village
instructions: +1 Action

name: Ruins
instructions: Setup: Shuffle the Ruins cards, then count out 10 per player after the first: 10 for two players, 20 for three players, 30 for four players, 40 for five players, or 50 for six players.

name: Sage
instructions:
+1 Action
Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal one costing $3 or more. Put that card into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Scavenger
instructions:
+$2
You may put your deck into your discard pile. Put a card from your discard pile onto your deck.

name: Shelters
instructions: Setup: If only Kingdom cards from Dark Ages are being used this game, the Shelter cards replace starting Estates - each player's starting deck is seven Coppers, a Hovel, a Necropolis, and an Overgrown Estate. If a mix of Kingdom cards from Dark Ages and other sets is being used, then the use of Shelters should be determined randomly, based on the proportion of Dark Ages cards in use.

name: Sir Bailey
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Destry
instructions:
+2 Cards
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Martin
instructions:
+2 Buys
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Michael
instructions: Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

name: Sir Vander
instructions:
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.
-----
When you trash this, gain a Gold.

name: Spoils
instructions:
$3
When you play this, return it to the Spoils pile.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Squire
instructions:
+$1
Choose one: +2 Actions; or +2 Buys; or gain a Silver.
-----
When you trash this, gain an Attack card.

name: Storeroom
instructions:
+1 Buy
Discard any number of cards, then draw that many. Then discard any number of cards for +$1 each.

name: Survivors
instructions: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Discard them or put them back in any order.

name: Urchin
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Each other player discards down to 4 cards in hand.
-----
When you play another Attack card with this in play, you may first trash this, to gain a Mercenary.

name: Vagrant
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Curse, Ruins, Shelter, or Victory card, put it into your hand.

name: Wandering Minstrel
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put the Action cards back in any order and discard the rest.
